abilities.name: Disguised
abilities.text: This model may not be the target of actions generated by the Charge action.

abilities.name: Smuggler's Secret
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may remove a Scheme marker within 6" to draw a card.

abilities.name: Vanishing Act
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack targeting this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to place the attacker within 5" of its current location.

actions.name: Double Whammy
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3. If the target is within 2" of a friendly marker, this action deals its damage twice.

triggers.name: Staged
triggers.text: This model gains a Backtrack token.

triggers.name: "It's Go Time!"
triggers.text: Friendly models within (t)2" of the target may move up to 3".

triggers.name: Black Market Manipulation
triggers.text: This model chooses: both players drain a (soulstone) or both players infuse a (soulstone).

triggers.name: Disorient
triggers.text: The target gains an Entranced token.

actions.name: Phantasmal Prism
actions.costs_and_restrictions: X is equal to the number of (soulstone) in the target's pool (to a minimum of 2 and maximum of 6).

triggers.name: Thief's Pocket
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Disorient
triggers.text: The target gains an Entranced token.

actions.name: The French Drop
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Place the target into base contact with a friendly marker within 6" of itself.

triggers.name: Baffled
triggers.text: Enemy models in (t)2" of the target gain an Entranced token.
